reviews.review_description:
Bottom Line Up Front (BLUF):  
Buy Enso if you're interested in a Focus meditation experience and avoid it if you just want a game.  

Longer Review:
Enso is a very simple, uncomplicated app.  It requires some hand-eye coordination and you might miscategorize it as a game.  In short, you draw a circle with your controller around glowing orbs floating toward the player.  The mechanics are minimal--don't go too fast and don't draw too soon.  You are intermittently reminded (via text overlays) to breathe deeply and relax while playing.  Ultimately, Enso is an app that helps you *focus* while cultivating a relaxed, meditative state.  And it works pretty well.  That said, there are a number of meditation apps that have similar "Focus" tools, but Enso is really decent and deserves consideration.  The graphics are simple & pleasant, the sound design is very nice, and the current asking price is perfectly fair & reasonable.  As far as negatives, I found the various modules difficult to distinguish from each other.  I also wish there was a way to show WHICH modules were completed.  The menu system, while attractive, requires you to awkwardly flip through a ton of modules.  These are very minor complaints though.  I've tried nearly every meditation app released since 2016, and Enso is a great experience that will help quiet brain-chatter and ease you into a more peaceful state.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your thoughts on Enso! I'm glad you found it simple and pleasant, with a focus on meditation. We appreciate your feedback on module distinguishability and completion tracking, and we'll take that into consideration for future improvements. Your support means a lot, and we're thrilled that Enso has helped quiet brain-chatter and bring more peace to your state. Wishing you continued serenity on your meditation journey!

reviews.review_title: Calming but not quite there yet
reviews.review_description:
The visuals and music are great! But there are just a few too many things that take away from this being a great experience. First - and very annoying - there is no way I can find to center the app in front of me. Holding down the right controller oculus button does not do anything. The beginning logo is in front but then when the graphics load they are all to the left side with no way to place it in front of me. If I am sitting on a couch or chair there is not a convenient way to view it if I am stationary. Makes no difference which direction I start in, it is always to my left. Definitely needs to have that standard feature of recentering that all my apps have.
Second - the pace of the orbs are really too fast. I can understand the speed for the focus modules but for the sleep, cool down, and relax it is just too fast and makes me tense. I enjoy watching the "explosion" but the next orb is coming at me too quickly to take it all in. Would love to see an option to control the speed to be slower (or even faster if I really want to focus). And thirdly - the sessions are too short. 4 1/2 minutes is just not enough time to settle in. I know I can repeat the session but it loses the rhythm and flow. I would like to see an option for time. Like a 5, 10, 20 minute session. I will say I like the reminders to take a deep breath and relax. But unfortunately, because of the centering issue and speed I am not sure how much I will use it. I do realize this was meant to be geared more towards mindfulness and not just meditative but these are distractions and I just find myself not enjoying it as much as I should. It would be a 5 star review if  not for these 3 issues. Also, the developer's website "contact us" link is not working so I do not have a direct support email to send correspondence about these issues. But again, the graphics are good and music is exceptional.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to write such a detailed review of Enso. Your feedback is incredibly valuable to us, and we're grateful for your honest insights.

Firstly, we apologize for the inconvenience you've experienced with the app's centering feature. We weren't aware of this issue, and it's something we're keen to resolve. Could you please let us know the type of device you're using? This information will help us replicate and address the problem more effectively.

We've also recently updated the "Contact" page on our website, which is now fully functional. We encourage you to use it for any further feedback or issues you may encounter.

Regarding your suggestions about controlling the speed of the orbs and the duration of the sessions, we think these are fantastic ideas! They align perfectly with our goal to provide a customizable and comfortable experience for all users. We're already looking into how we can implement these features in a future update.

We truly appreciate your comments about the graphics and music, and we're sorry to hear that the current issues have impacted your enjoyment of the app. Rest assured, we're committed to improving Enso and addressing your concerns as swiftly as possible.

Thank you once again for your feedback. We hope that with the upcoming improvements, Enso will fully meet your meditation needs and earn that 5-star review.

reviews.review_description:
One of the things that immediately stood out to me about the game was it’s user-friendly interface. The layout is clean, intuitive and easy to navigate, making easy for users to find and choose the meditation or mindfulness exercise that suits their needs.
Users can choose from a range or guided meditations that vary in length, focus and style, making it easy to find a meditation that fits into their schedule and preferences.
I would highly recommend Enso to anyone looking for an effective and easy to use relaxation game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your positive feedback about Enso! We are thrilled to hear that you found our interface user-friendly and that our range of guided meditations made it easy for you to find the perfect meditation to fit your needs. It means a lot to us that you would recommend Enso to others seeking an effective and easy-to-use relaxation game. We appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description: The game worked well and was very relaxing although I would like more text talking about how the meditation actually helps and what it's doing and such

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Thanks for your feedback on Enso. I'm glad to hear that the game worked well for you and provided a relaxing experience. Your suggestion about providing more text explaining the benefits of meditation is definitely noted. We're always looking to enhance the user experience, so we'll consider incorporating more information about the meditation techniques and their effects in future updates. Stay tuned for exciting improvements!

Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts. Have a zen-tastic day!

reviews.review_description: This app is a simple yet effective way to relax, with calming music and sounds, and a flow which makes the tasks easy to undertake as you focus your mind. With various levels, you are able to determine how much distraction your mind needs to take you away from the fast paced nature of modern life. The app itself involves creating circles around glowing orbs, which then burst with a ripple similar to water. Simple, yet effective.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with Enso. We're glad to hear that you find the app effective in helping you relax and find inner peace. Our team worked hard to create a simple yet engaging experience, and it's great to hear that the calming music and flow of tasks have been helpful. We appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description: As a sufferer of Anxiety, having tried Enso VR, I can see how something like this can be beneficial, just for 5-15 minutes at the end of the day to help unwind, destress & relax a little.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thank you so much for sharing your thoughts on Enso VR. We're absolutely thrilled that it's helping you unwind, destress, and relax – because that's precisely what we designed it for! 🎯 If Enso were a superhero, its mission would be to zap away anxiety, one meditation session at a time. 💥🧘‍♂️🧘‍♀️ We appreciate your feedback and hope Enso continues to be a valuable companion in your daily quest for relaxation. Keep calm and meditate on! ✨

reviews.review_description:
Enso is a Virtual Reality Meditation app that allows you to find your inner peace. This game is very relaxing and is a great way to unwind from a stressful day at work. There are several different lessons that guide you through a visual and musical experience to meditate on anything that may be part of your day to day problems!

Video Review: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2J7ZC3nhJs4

developer_response.body: Thanks for your awesome review of Enso and for sharing the video review on YouTube! We're thrilled to hear that our app helped you relax. We're also glad to hear that you remembered to exhale after taking those deep breaths - that's an important step that some people forget! Keep up the good work and keep spreading the word about Enso. Namaste! 🙏🏻

reviews.review_description: My parents sometimes borrows my headset and all they use is this meditation app. They said it was relaxing for them. Happy it made them feel better.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing this lovely feedback! It's wonderful to hear that your parents are finding relaxation and joy in using Enso. Knowing that it's making a positive difference in their well-being truly means a lot to us. If they, or you, have any suggestions or further thoughts on their experience, please feel free to share. Happy meditating to your family!

reviews.review_description: This is such a lovely app! I love the short sessions and how easy it is to jump into a focus session throughout my busy workdays. Who else has their Quest next to their desk??? If you don't, it might be time for it 😂 The graphics and sounds are just gorgeous - I definitely recommend giving it a try - or 4!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your lovely review! We're thrilled to hear that Enso has been a helpful addition to your busy workdays. It's great to hear that the short sessions and ease of use have been valuable to you. And we agree, having your Quest nearby is definitely a game changer 😂 We're glad that you appreciate the graphics and sounds, and we appreciate your recommendation to others. Thank you for using Enso and for taking the time to share your experience!

reviews.review_description: I was excited to try this app as I love vr meditation stuff. It did not disappoint!  It gives you something to do which is to concentrate on circling glowing different colored orbs that are coming towards you  - if you circle too fast, it will give you feedback.  If you do well, it will say so. It also reminds you to breath. There is ambient calming music playing in the background.  The music, combined with the activity and colorful visuals, is a nice distraction from negative thoughts, and  is a good activity to prepare one for sleep. This will be another tool in my VR meditation arsenal. In the future, it would be cool to include some guided meditations with the visuals in addition to the music.

developer_response.body: I'm really glad to hear that Enso has made a positive impact on your meditation routine! It's fantastic to see that the combination of music, visuals, and interactive elements has provided you with a great way to unwind and prepare for sleep. Your suggestion for guided meditations is much appreciated, and I'll definitely take it into consideration for future updates. Thank you for taking the time to share your experience and for adding Enso to your VR meditation arsenal!

reviews.review_description: Great app for distracting myself from anxiety and good when I feel contention. I liked the different meditation styles and although some were more active than others, I think they are all good for escaping reality and stress.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Thank you for your review of Enso. I'm thrilled to hear that the app has been helpful in distracting you from anxiety and providing a sense of contentment. It's great to know that the different meditation styles resonated with you, even if some were more active. Our aim is to create a diverse range of experiences that allow users to escape reality and reduce stress.

Your feedback is truly appreciated. If you have any more suggestions or comments, feel free to share them. Keep enjoying your peaceful moments with Enso!

reviews.review_description: I personally love practicing meditation and obviously love playing VR! Glad there’s a game that ties the two together. This one is a relaxing game great for meditation and mindfulness

developer_response.body: We're delighted to hear that Enso resonates with your love for both meditation and VR! It's wonderful to know that our app has become a go-to for your meditation and mindfulness practice. Thanks for the positive review, and may you continue to find tranquility in the virtual realm! 😊

reviews.review_description:
Developers offered a code for free to review….It’s not an unpleasant experience, but I found it to be a little too “active” for my personal preference for meditation. 
For some of the titles of the differing meditations, such as ‘focus,’ I suppose it’s appropriate, but for ‘sleep’ I found the required movements distracting from my overall goal. 
Itis a nice change from some of the other ‘zen’ touchy-feels meditation apps, so if your looking for something which doesnt feel preachy, this might be for you

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts and experiences with Enso. I appreciate your honest feedback and am glad to hear that you found it to be a refreshing change from other meditation apps. I understand that the active nature of some of the meditations may not be for everyone, but I hope that you found some value in the app nonetheless. Thanks again for trying it out!

reviews.review_description:
Enso VR is a fantastic app that simplifies meditation and makes it accessible to anyone.

What I love about Enso VR is that it's so easy to use, yet so effective. Even if you're a beginner, the app provides a seamless experience that helps you unlock your inner peace.

Overall, I highly recommend Enso VR to anyone who wants to explore the benefits of meditation and unlock their inner peace. It's simple, yet effective, and definitely worth trying out. Thank you to the developers for creating such a wonderful app!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your amazing review! It means the world to us that Enso has been able to help you simplify meditation.

We designed the app to be easy to use, yet highly effective, especially for those who are new to meditation. We're so glad to hear that our seamless experience helped you unlock your inner peace.

Your recommendation to anyone looking to explore the benefits of meditation is truly appreciated.

reviews.review_title: Just try it, What a game!
reviews.review_description:
The VR technology can offer a highly immersive and engaging experience for meditation tool, and this game seems to have done an excelent job of leveraging that potential.
The game's graphics and audio are top, creating a peaceful and calming environment that transport players to serene and beautiful locations. The visuals are so well-rendered that players are actually there, and the sounds of space add to the immersive experience.
The game offer guided meditations including breathwork exercises and visualizations, to help you relax and reduce stress.
The game also offers different levels of difficulty and duration which cater to players preferences and abilities.
The control are intuitive and easy to use.
Overall this game is an exceptional experience that can help player to reduce stress and anxiety while promoting mindfulness and relaxation.
If you are looking for a truly immersive and calming experience Enso is definitely worth checking out.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to leave such a thoughtful review. We're thrilled to hear that you found Enso to be an exceptional experience that promotes relaxation and mindfulness. We hope that Enso continues to be a helpful tool in your journey towards stress reduction and mindfulness.

reviews.review_description:
The game really lets you become immersed in itself, making sure you keep your focus as you wave your hands around slowly and circle sparkles and stars. It's a different type of meditation experience that I wasn't expecting and really enjoyed. The music is pretty nice and helps get into it too. If you'd rather just relax and forget about circling your controllers around thats also an option. I liked to close my eyes and take deep breaths. It's fun to reaaally reach that point where you just feel your body floating and you can open your eyes to all the color and stars around you. 
As a newbie on VR meditation I can say I'm quite happy with this experience. 

As a side-note, the dev was nice to give me a free key to the app, which I really do appreciate. My sister is a meditation nut and I really wanted her to try out yet another little VR activity. She was thrilled! And also relaxed. Very relaxed! Thank you.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your detailed experience with Enso! I'm delighted to hear that both you and your sister enjoyed the unique meditation journey it offers. Floating in a world of color and stars sounds like a dream 😊

Your feedback is invaluable, and I'm grateful for your kind words. Keep exploring the wonders of VR meditation, and may Enso continue to bring you and your sister moments of relaxation and tranquility!

reviews.review_description: Love this game. Very relaxing. A little slow off the start, however, this makes sense as this game is designed to keep you relaxed or to help you help yourself relax I should say. Circling energy orbs with a primary energy orb while keeping the hand steady and the mind calm. Find the right speed and you will succeed.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind review! We're thrilled to hear that you find Enso relaxing. We intentionally designed the game to be slow at the start to help you ease into a peaceful state of mind. Keep up the good work circling those energy orbs and remember to breathe deeply!

reviews.review_description: Got this app for free from the devs, Thank you guys, as my wife and I are usually stressed out and don't get much time to relax but once we got this app, the amount of stress was greatly reduced. We will continue to use this to reduce our stress and highly recommend this app to any and all parents!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words and fantastic review! We're thrilled to hear that Enso has been helping you and your wife destress in the midst of parenting (we know it's no easy feat!). Keep enjoying those well-deserved relaxation sessions, and remember, happy parents make for happy kids! 😊

reviews.review_title: Active Meditation To Calm Your Mind
reviews.review_description:
Enso is the new player entering the VR meditation space. To me, I found that Enso particularly focuses on the focus of the user. Focusing on the focus... hopefully, that makes sense! This app is more of an active approach at the practice where you’ll use your controllers to circle around the orbs that approach your way. The different modes include what you might be used to seeing like focus, relaxation, memory, concentration, sleep, and more. From my personal experience with the app, you literally focus on the experience so much that I really feel like I'm totally immersed in the space Enso created while feeling the sense of calm that you realize after the practice. 

This app is geared more towards users that don’t enjoy sitting around just to focusing on their breathing so if you see yourself as someone that can relate to that, be sure to check this app out.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your thoughts on Enso! We're glad to hear that you found the app to be a unique and engaging way to practice meditation. We appreciate your observations about how Enso focuses on the user's focus, and we're happy to hear that you felt totally immersed in the experience. It's also great to hear that you enjoyed the variety of modes the app has to offer, and that you found it to be an active and effective approach to meditation.

We designed Enso to be a different kind of meditation experience, one that is more dynamic and interactive than traditional practices. We believe that using VR technology can make meditation more accessible and enjoyable for people who might not be drawn to more traditional methods, and we're thrilled that you found the app to be helpful and engaging.

Thank you again for sharing your feedback with us. We hope that Enso will continue to be a valuable part of your meditation practice, and we look forward to hearing more about your experiences with the app in the future.

reviews.review_description: It works as intended. I've liked the experience so far, even though I don't have many hours on it

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review of Enso! It's great that you've enjoyed the experience, even with limited hours on it. Quality matters more than quantity when it comes to finding moments of calm and relaxation.
